name.description: Human-readable name for this mesh network

meshCIDR.description: The IP range for mesh-internal addresses, e.g. 100.64.0.0/10

defaultRelays.description: Default DERP relay URLs for the network

dnsServers.description: DNS servers available within the mesh

magicDNSSuffix.description: DNS suffix for mesh-local hostname resolution, e.g. 'mesh.local'

listenPort.description: Default WireGuard listen port for nodes
